mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND module = '登录' AND status = 1
AND DATE(create_time) = CURDATE()
AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)

SELECT u.id as userId, u.username, u.real_name as realName, u.user_type as userType, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_log WHERE user_id = u.id AND module = '登录' AND status = 1 AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)) as loginCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM booking_order WHERE user_id = u.id AND status IN (1, 3) AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)) as bookingCount, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(duration), 0) FROM booking_order WHERE user_id = u.id AND status IN (1, 3) AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)) as totalDuration FROM sys_user u WHERE u.deleted = 0 ORDER BY bookingCount DESC, loginCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT IFNULL(COUNT(DISTINCT user_id), 0) FROM sys_log WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL AND status = 1 AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) AND (request_url LIKE '%/user/login%' OR module LIKE '%登录%')

SELECT DATE(create_time) AS dateStr, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS cnt FROM sys_log WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL AND status = 1 AND (request_url LIKE '%/user/login%' OR module LIKE '%登录%') AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE(create_time) ORDER BY dateStr
